tagline: June 18, 2026 Lakebase Autoscaling now supports Postgres 18.
what_it_does: June 18, 2026 Lakebase Autoscaling now supports Postgres 18. Postgres 17 remains the default version.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.

capabilities.title: June 18, 2026 Lakebase
capabilities.desc: June 18, 2026 Lakebase Autoscaling now supports Postgres 18.

key_takeaway: June 18, 2026 Lakebase Autoscaling now supports Postgres 18.
